title: Select and supply automotive parts and products
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and supply automotive parts and products demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine required information relating to part or product

pcs.text: Gather and document available information on required item and confirm with customer1.2 Determine original host for the part or product from available information

elements.title: Identify part or product and record details

pcs.text: Identify and access index system for part or product host 2.2 Match part or product with cataloguing information using the parts index system, its aids and user guides, and identify potential suppliers 2.3 Seek clarification regarding potential match from supplier as required2.4 Document and process identifying details of part or product
